entries.text: File cleanup win: safely quarantined 31 obvious duplicate files from Downloads, verified 31/31 destination files exist, 31/31 hashes matched, 31/31 source files moved, 0 problems, 695.1 MB removed from clutter. No files deleted. Rollback manifest: /sdcard/Documents/Atlas_File_Quarantine/_logs/quarantine_move_manifest_20260629_063949.tsv

File cleanup manual review: classified 481 remaining duplicate rows. Left untouched: 344 non-download duplicates, 47 active-project protected rows, 46 protected/media/sensitive rows, 25 other manual rows, 8 different-filename same-hash rows, 6 extension mismatch rows, 5 suspicious renamed APK rows totaling 55.4 MB. No files moved or deleted.
Defined Atlas Automation Factory vision: Termux self-healing, project auto-indexing, RAG sync, GitHub Actions build commander, safe file organization, task queue, and simulated agent/swarm roles.

SameWave source audit found invite links working but music/chat sync is local simulation only. Added real sync plan requiring Firebase Realtime Database metadata sync and legal no-audio-rebroadcast direction.
Added Atlas mainstream agent profile and tool registry. Atlas should classify tasks, choose tools, avoid fake claims, patch with backups, verify outputs, and log durable project truth.
Added Firebase Android truth rules to Atlas system prompt after Atlas hallucinated adb install google-services.json and incorrect Firebase setup steps.
Added Firebase Android truth rules to Atlas system prompt after Atlas hallucinated adb install google-services.json and incorrect Firebase setup steps.
Created Atlas + GitHub Mobile App Factory spec for evidence-first mobile app creation, auditing, patching, GitHub Actions builds, APK artifact handling, and safe release workflow.

Codespaces command bridge is working. Created Codespace refactored-telegram-r7gjp6vrpg7p2pqpj for SameWave.v4. Termux command atlascsr successfully runs commands inside /workspaces/SameWave.v4. Verified Java, Python, Node, Git, and GitHub CLI are available in Codespaces.

Ran atlas-app-scan on SameWave. Evidence report saved at /data/data/com.termux/files/home/atlas-reports/samewave_rebuild_work-app-scan-20260701_012901.txt. This scan should be used before Atlas claims app features, backend state, Firebase config, APK artifacts, or sync behavior.

Ran atlas-app-verdict on SameWave. Deterministic verdict saved at /data/data/com.termux/files/home/atlas-reports/samewave_rebuild_work-app-verdict-20260701_014510.txt. Use verdict before trusting Atlas app analysis.

Re-ran fixed atlas-app-verdict on SameWave with fake/demo marker detection working. Verdict saved at /data/data/com.termux/files/home/atlas-reports/samewave_rebuild_work-app-verdict-20260701_014617.txt.

Created SameWave sync scout report at /data/data/com.termux/files/home/atlas-reports/samewave-sync-scout-20260701_021439.txt. Firebase plugin and Realtime Database dependency are present. Next patch should add real metadata sync using Firebase Realtime Database, without claiming demo sync is real.
